creator: gfaria.mello@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 235941
dmesg from my system

Hi everyone, 

I think that FreeBSD "amdtemp" does not recognize/support AMD 4700S because sysctl return nothing about temperature:

sysctl -a | grep temp
<118>>>> Invoking early script 'templates'
<118>>>> Error in early script 'templates'
WARNING: attempt to domain_add(netgraph) after domainfinalize()
vm.pfault_oom_attempts: 3
net.inet6.ip6.use_tempaddr: 0
net.inet6.ip6.temppltime: 86400
net.inet6.ip6.tempvltime: 604800
net.inet6.ip6.prefer_tempaddr: 0
	value:	p
hw.usb.template: -1
kstat.zfs.misc.arcstats.arc_tempreserve: 0
